data.title: Gate.io Launchpool Lists Pell Network (PELL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io will launch Pell Network (PELL) spot trading at 18:00 (UTC+8) on March 13, 2025. Staking mining will be launched from 18:00 on March 13 to 18:00 on March 25 (UTC+8). Staking PELL, GT, and BTC to participate in Launchpool can share 7,002,801 PELL tokens for free. Among them, the PELL mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 760.42%, the GT mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 29.59%, and the BTC mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 12.31%.

data.title: LBank's latest Launchpool project RealtyX (RX) is launched at 12:00 today
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to LBank official news, LBank Launchpool project RealtyX (RX) has opened registration, and the registration time is from 12:00 on March 13 to 14:00 on March 19 (SGT). 
According to the information, RealtyX (RX) is an innovative platform that focuses on combining real-world assets (RWA) with blockchain technology, aiming to provide liquidity for real estate and other tangible assets through decentralized finance (DeFi).

data.title: Trezor Addresses Security Flaw in Latest Models
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, hardware wallet provider Trezor has resolved a security vulnerability in its Safe 3 and 5 models after competitor Ledger's open-source research team identified a flaw in their microcontrollers. Ledger Donjon, the research arm, acknowledged Trezor's recent security improvements but noted that cryptographic operations could still be executed on the microcontroller, potentially exposing the devices to advanced attacks.

Trezor has since addressed these vulnerabilities, as confirmed by Ledger's chief technology officer, Charles Guillemet, in a March 12 post on X. Guillemet emphasized the importance of enhancing security across the ecosystem to support the broader adoption of cryptocurrencies and digital assets. Trezor had previously integrated "Secure Elements"—chips designed to safeguard users' PIN codes and cryptographic secrets—into its devices to prevent tampering and potential theft of user funds. This feature effectively counters inexpensive hardware attacks, such as voltage glitching, providing users with confidence in the safety of their funds even if their device is lost or stolen.

Despite these measures, Ledger identified another potential vulnerability related to the microcontroller, a key component of Trezor's two-chip design for the Safe 3 and 5 models. Although Trezor implemented a firmware integrity check to detect software modifications, Ledger demonstrated that an attacker could bypass this security measure. Trezor has since resolved this issue, though details on the resolution have not been disclosed by either company. Cointelegraph reached out to Trezor for further information but did not receive an immediate response.

Trezor confirmed on X that user funds remain secure and no action is required from users. However, when questioned about the possibility of patching the issue via firmware, Trezor stated that it was not feasible. The company emphasized the importance of a multi-layer defense strategy against supply chain attacks and advised users to purchase devices from official sources to ensure security.

Ledger, too, has faced security challenges. In December 2023, a hacker breached Ledger's connector library, resulting in the theft of $484,000 worth of crypto assets. Additionally, in June 2020, another breach led to the publication of mailing addresses for approximately 270,000 Ledger customers. These incidents highlight the ongoing security challenges within the cryptocurrency hardware wallet industry.

data.title: Phishing Websites Exploit Bing Ads In Crypto Searches
data.description: According to Foresight News, MistTrack has identified several phishing websites appearing in cryptocurrency project searches through Bing advertisements. Users are advised to exercise caution to protect their assets. Foresight News warns against connecting to these phishing sites to prevent potential asset loss.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of $13.3326 million yesterday, the first net inflow after net outflows in the past 7 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 12, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 13.3326 million US dollars.
Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of 11.805 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is 22.489 billion US dollars.
Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net inflow of 5.5112 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is 1.092 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a single-day net inflow of 82.6043 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of ARKB reached 2.554 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$92.454 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.61%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.415 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $10.4023 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 6 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 12, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $10.4023 million.
The Ethereum ETF with the largest outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Ethereum ETF FETH, with a net outflow of $3.75 million in a single day. Currently, FETH has a total net inflow of $1.43 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a net outflow of $3.5402 million in a single day. Currently, Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH has a total net inflow of $606 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is $6.663 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 2.92%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.629 billion.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a 6.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 04:04 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.820007 USDT, with a narrowed 6.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Opinion: ETH/BTC ratio hits a 5-year low, it is recommended to turn to strong altcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Ethereum to Bitcoin ratio fell to 0.02281, a nearly 5-year low. Economist and crypto trader Alex Kruger suggested that investors should consider selling ETH and turning to stronger performing altcoins to obtain higher returns when the market rebounds. Although the bottoming of the ETH/BTC ratio is often seen as a signal that the altcoin season has begun, CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index shows that the current market is still biased towards Bitcoin dominance. Bitcoin's market capitalization currently accounts for 62.15%, while when Ethereum hit its all-time high in November 2021, Bitcoin accounted for only 42%. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow In The U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 13, Farside Investors reported a net outflow of $10.3 million from U.S. Ethereum spot ETFs. The breakdown of the outflows includes $3.7 million from Fidelity's FETH, $1.7 million from 21 Shares' CETH, $1.4 million from Franklin's EZET, and $3.5 million from Grayscale's Mini ETH.

data.title: OKX will delist XR, GOAL, KP3R, LBR, LAMB, BZZ and GPT spot trading pairs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, in order to maintain a healthy spot trading environment, OKX will delist multiple trading pairs that do not meet the listing standards. The affected trading pairs include XR/USDT, GOAL/USDT, GOAL/USDC, KP3R/USDT, KP3R/USDC, LBR/USDT, LAMB/USDT, LAMB/USDC, BZZ/USDT, BZZ/USDC and GPT/USDT.
OKX will delist the above trading pairs from 16:00-17:00 Beijing time on March 20, 2025. The platform recommends that users cancel the relevant orders before delisting, otherwise the system will automatically cancel these orders, and the cancellation process may take 1-3 working days.
